nasb.text: One of the lawyers *said to Him in reply, “Teacher, when You say this, You insult us too.”

esv.text: One of the lawyers answered him, “Teacher, in saying these things you insult us also.”

cnv.text: 律法師中有一個回答他：“老師，你這樣說，把我們也侮辱了！”

ccb.text: 一位律法教师对耶稣说：“老师，你这话把我们也侮辱了！”

csbs.text: 有一个律法师对耶稣说：“老师，你说这些话，把我们也侮辱了。”
